nodes.label: Enhance Sound Cues Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Enhance sound cues by supporting adjustable volume and adding a success chime for voice commands using Web Audio API.

nodes.label: Enhanced Voice Overlay Features Plan
nodes.rationale: Master plan to implement visual waveform, configurable voice commands, AI screen/grammar features, and sound cues.

nodes.label: Expand Settings Schema Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Expand AppSettings and DEFAULT_SETTINGS to support new feature toggles and volume control.

nodes.label: Fix Clipboard Bridge and State Race Conditions Plan
nodes.rationale: Fix restricted navigator.clipboard access via IPC bridge and use session IDs to prevent async state race conditions in useRecorder.
nodes.norm_label: fix clipboard bridge and state race conditions plan

nodes.label: Integrate Waveform and Settings into Overlay Plan
nodes.rationale: Connect new settings and the Waveform component to the actual recording logic in the Overlay UI.
nodes.norm_label: integrate waveform and settings into overlay plan

nodes.label: IPC Constants Cleanup Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Centralize hardcoded IPC strings in src/shared/types.ts to ensure type safety and architectural consistency.

nodes.label: Revamp Settings UI Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Overhaul settings panel with new sections for Intelligence, Audio, and Appearance with consistent styling.

nodes.label: Settings UI and History Logic Fix Plan
nodes.rationale: Centralize history recording into a dedicated IPC call to avoid duplication and improve language selection UI.
nodes.norm_label: settings ui and history logic fix plan

nodes.label: Update Voice Command Processor Plan
nodes.rationale: Extend processCommand to support prefix ("Hey Orb") and always-listening trigger modes.

nodes.label: Visual Waveform Component Implementation Plan
nodes.rationale: Create a smooth, liquid-style sine wave visualizer on Canvas to replace bar-based SVG visualizer.

nodes.label: Design Spec: Enhanced Voice Overlay Features
nodes.norm_label: design spec: enhanced voice overlay features

nodes.label: Design Spec: Smooth Waveform Visualizer
nodes.rationale: Provide more fluid and organic feedback to user voice activity using overlapping sine waves.

nodes.label: Sound Cues (Earcons)
nodes.rationale: Audio feedback for start, stop, and command execution using Web Audio API oscillators.

nodes.label: Visual Waveform
nodes.rationale: Animated liquid-style sine wave visualizer indicating voice activity level.

nodes.label: Voice Commands
nodes.rationale: Keyword-based actions (send, delete, fix grammar) triggered by speech recognition.

nodes.label: AI Features
nodes.rationale: GPT-4o powered features for grammar correction and screen description.
